data_collected.title: Data Collected
data_collected.intro: I only collect data that you voluntarily provide via the contact form:

legal_basis.title: Legal Basis and Purposes
legal_basis.consent: The processing of your data is based on
legal_basis.consent_end: , given when submitting the contact form.
legal_basis.usage_intro: Your data is used only for:

purposes.quote: Providing you with a personalized quote

legal_basis.no_sharing: I do not sell, rent or share your data with third parties.

recipients.title: Data Recipients
recipients.text: Only Perrine Huon has access to your personal data. No third party has access to it, except by legal obligation.

hosting.title: Hosting and Transfers
hosting.intro: Your data is securely stored with:
hosting.gdpr_compliance: These providers comply with GDPR and have signed standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission to regulate data transfers outside the EU.

security.title: Data Security
security.intro: I implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data:

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.after: after our last exchange, then deleted.

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

list.access_desc: : obtain a copy of your data
list.portability_desc: : retrieve your data in a usable format
list.objection_desc: : object to the processing of your data

complaint.title: Complaint
complaint.text: If you believe that the processing of your data does not comply with regulations, you can file a complaint with the

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: This site only uses technical cookies necessary for its operation. No tracking or advertising cookies are used without your consent.

contact.text: For any questions regarding this privacy policy:
